title: The Frightened Lion
content:
A Bull Frog, according to rule,
    Sat a-croak in his usual pool:
    And he laughed in his heart
    As a Lion did start
    In a fright from the brink like a fool.

    Imaginary Fears Are The Worst
meaning: About: Walter Crane was an English artist and book illustrator. He produced paintings, illustrations, children's books, ceramic tiles and other decorative arts.
